Replaced router.isFallback loading pattern with a loading.tsx file in app/blog/[id]/ that Next.js automatically renders during page generation. Why: App Router separates concerns — not-found.tsx handles 404 errors declaratively, error.tsx handles runtime errors with a reset() retry mechanism.
